\tzpentry{ID3867}{Partial Eigenvalue Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3867 introduces Partial Eigenvalue Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\\\\partial\_t n \= \\\\lambda \- \\\\Gamma n \+ D\_n \\\\nabla^2 n.$$
